content:
Module: Week 4 | Rough Draft & Peer Review
Due Date: [Insert Date]
Points: 100 pts
Submission Type: File Upload (DOCX or PDF)

⸻

📘 Purpose:

The rough draft is a critical step in building a strong final paper. This version doesn’t need to be perfect—it needs to be complete enough for peer review. You’ll use this draft to receive detailed feedback before your final revision.

⸻

📄 Requirements:
• Write a minimum 5-paragraph essay in APA format:
• Introduction (with clear thesis statement)
• 3 Body Paragraphs (with comparisons, transitions, and supporting evidence)
• Conclusion (restating thesis and summarizing key points)
• Use APA formatting: title page, in-text citations (if applicable), reference page (if needed).
• Submit your file before the peer review deadline so your partner has time to respond.

⸻

🧠 Draft Completion Checklist:
• My thesis is clear and compares two distinct things (concepts, ideas, people, etc.).
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 7 (chunk 7/11)
